title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・Der Stolz

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Juhu! Geschafft! I have done it!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Eishin Flaaaaash! Congratulatiooons!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Danke schön! Thank you for your support!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Here I stand as the Derby champion at the Tokyo
Racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm victorious once more!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Flash's Mother
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Mother, Father. And... Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: All of this was for you. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash kneels on the turf, her face brimming
with pride. She is absolutely radiant.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Papa, Mama!

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
It has been a very long time since you have called
us that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Oh! I mean... Father, Mother.
choice_data_list: I'll excuse myself for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to ruin the moment, so I leave the
three of them alone for a moment.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Flash. You ran a superb race.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text: We're so proud of you.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
Of course, you would be the apple of our eye
even if you did nothing at all. Nothing will change
that.

text_block_list.name: Flash's Father
text_block_list.text:
But you have forged your own path and earned
our respect as your own person.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Father...

text_block_list.name: Flash's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Flash, you have blossomed so wonderfully. I'm so
glad we came to see you!

text_block_list.name: Flash's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Your running was so spectacular, it brought tears
to my eyes. You were truly super, toll und klasse!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I have returned. Thank you for being so
considerate.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They plan to do some sightseeing in Tokyo, then
return to their hotel. Do you think I can receive
permission to go out tonight if I submit the form
now?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: My parents said that they are proud of me.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It was an arduous journey with many twists and
turns, but I have accomplished my goal.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Had I strayed from my plan, I doubt I would have
felt like I achieved so much.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
And you were always there to encourage me.
Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her phrasing is so final that I can't bring myself to say anything to lighten the mood. After all, the end is nearing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My last remaining goal is the Arima Kinen. I will
keep running, to the very end...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: So let's put together the perfect schedule for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she intends to stick to her original plan
and retire after the Arima Kinen. If that's what she
wants, then it's not my place to object.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Memories of her flying down the racetrack flood
my mind's eye as I gaze at her race schedule for
next year.
